title: SolidWorks: Beginner to CSWA
description: Learn fundamental 3D parametric modeling and master your first official certification.
highlights: Live CSWA Prep & Practice Exam Mockups

lectures.title: Lecture 1 - Introduction to the Learning Path
lectures.description: A focused overview of the tools, workflow, and outcomes for this course.

lectures.title: Lecture 2 - Core Modeling Workflow
lectures.description: Build the first practical model while learning clean sketch and feature habits.

lectures.title: Lecture 3 - Practice Task and Review
lectures.description: Apply the workflow to a guided task and review common mistakes.

title: Advanced Part & Assembly Design
description: Level up to multi-body master-modeling, structural weldments, and complex sheet metal.

title: FEA Simulation & Mechanics
description: Validate your designs. Run stress analysis, fatigue, and structural optimization simulations.

title: AutoCAD Fundamentals
description: Build precise 2D technical drawings and layer standards used on real production floors.

title: Design for Manufacturing (DFM)
description: Design parts that survive contact with the manufacturing floor - first time, every time.
highlights: Injection Molding & Sheet Metal DFM Rules

title: Manufacturing Drawings & GD&T
description: Produce drawings a machinist can pick up and build from without a single phone call.

title: Product Design Fundamentals
description: Move from concept sketch to a manufacturable product with a repeatable design process.

title: Mechanical Design: Real Projects
description: Apply everything to a capstone mechanical assembly, reviewed like a real engineering project.

title: Embedded Systems Foundations
description: Bridge mechanical and electrical engineering with practical embedded fundamentals.

title: CAD Best Practices & Standards
description: The workflow discipline that keeps feature trees clean and models from breaking.

title: Engineering Projects Studio
description: A guided studio where you take one product from brief to manufacturing-ready package.
